sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The game is over again. I keep getting the same pattern: the game ends after I remove 16 actions (the left panel's white bars). The executed actions show the left panel's white bars (cols 8, 13, 18, 23). But I'm trying to remove white bars from the right panel (cols 39, 44, 49, 54). But the executed actions are from the left panel (cols 8, 13, 18, 23).
Wait, I see the issue now. When I filter for white bars (col < 32), I'm getting the left panel's white bars (cols 8, 13, 18, 23). But I'm trying to remove the right panel's white bars (cols 39, 44, 49, 54). But the executed actions are from the left panel (cols 8, 13, 18, 23).
This is confusing. Let me think about this more carefully. The executed actions show MOUSE(row=36, col=8), MOUSE(row=36, col=13), etc. These are the left panel's white bars. But I was trying to remove all white bars (both panels). But the executed actions are only executed 16 actions, not 20. So the game stopped early after 16 actions (the left panel's white bars).
Wait, the executed actions are:
- MOUSE(row=36, col=8), MOUSE(row=36, col=13), MOUSE(row=36, col=18), MOUSE(row=36, col=23), MOUSE(row=39, col=8), MOUSE(row=39, col=13), MOUSE(row=39, col=18), MOUSE(row=39, col=23), MOUSE(row=42, col=8), MOUSE(row=42, col=13)...
These are all from the left panel (cols 8, 13, 18, 23). So the game stopped after 16 actions (4 rows * 4 cols = 16 actions. The game ends after 16 actions.
So the pattern is:
16 actions (the left panel's white bars). The game ends after 16 actions. So the game ends when I remove 16 white bars from the left panel. The right panel's white bars remain.
So the goal is to remove only the right panel's white bars, not the left panel's white bars. Let me filter for white bars in the right panel (col >= 32).
Wait, but I already tried that earlier and it didn't work. Let me re-examine. The right panel's white bars are in cols 39, 44, 49, 54.9, 54. Let me filter for white bars in the right panel (col >= 32).
